response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and polyglot development skills with a focus on modern web and tooling technologies, but lacks direct experience with the core requirements of this role: C++ on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle, and capital markets/fixed income domain expertise. His background in low-latency systems and financial services (RIDE Capital) is a partial fit, but the mismatch in technical stack and domain depth limits his overall alignment.
strengths: Proven experience in financial services (RIDE Capital) and low-latency systems (Sociomantic), showing adaptability to regulated environments.
Strong communication and knowledge-sharing skills, evidenced by workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
Diverse technical background with exposure to multiple languages (D, Java, C/C++), though not at the depth required for this role.
concerns: No explicit C++ experience on Windows in the last 5+ years; most recent work is JavaScript/TypeScript-focused.
Lacks direct fixed income or capital markets domain expertise; financial experience is limited to general investment practices.
SQL experience appears secondary (MongoDB primary), with no mention of SQL Server or Oracle proficiency.
